extra.reason: Implemented the V1 local-first foundation: Rust CLI/workspace, SQLite storage, four local importers, pricing snapshot/overrides, SSH remote configuration with read-only discovery, embedded React/Vite dashboard, tests, validation, and turn documentation. Follow-up remote import and fixture hardening are tracked separately.

Fixed Codex token_count accounting by reading payload.info.last_token_usage as the event increment, splitting cached input from non-cached input for Codex rows, and adding regression coverage. Validation: cargo test -p dirtydash; temp import produced Codex 30d base-rate estimate .05.

Fixed imported Codex/pi-agent spend undercounting by parsing nested usage, using source-reported costs, aliasing Codex/OpenAI pricing identifiers, updating stale imported rows on reimport, adding regressions, and updating the dashboard to surface unpriced tokens.

Resolved PR #2 merge conflicts by merging origin/main into lavender/accounting-diff-investigation, preserving both importer fixes in importers.rs, keeping Beads records from both sides, and validating with cargo fmt --check, cargo test -p dirtydash, and dashboard build.
Clarified cache read share semantics in the dashboard and API, documented cache-write limitations, and validated build/test/browser smoke checks.
Implemented model-only display labels, kept fast-mode slugs separate, refreshed Cursor-aligned bundled pricing, and added regression coverage.
